philosophy: Composition-First Governance: Canonical compositions are the primary source of truth. Primitives must support exact parity without injecting generic chrome or alternate structural DNA.

manageCollaborators.header: Title + Count Badge + Right Action Row; No Close Button
manageCollaborators.footer: Full-width subtle gray bar; thin divider; icon-text left; CTA right
manageCollaborators.body: Search Row anchored directly below subtitle; Divider-break; Sectioned card stack

destructiveConfirmation.header: Status chip + Title; Ghost close button
destructiveConfirmation.footer: Soft inset card tray; no background block

anti_drift_rules: Do not inject 'showClose' in Manage canonical unless specifically requested
Footer trays for Manage must be 'none' inset with subtle surface
Header Action (right-side) must be used for Manage's 'Revoke All' logic
Search rows must be anchored with PopupSearchRow primitive
